title: Subclinical Hypothyroidism in Women Over 40: Signs and Natural Support Options
author: Happy Aging Team
reviewer: Dr. Daniel Yadegar, MD, FACC, RPVI
meta_description: Subclinical hypothyroidism affects 1 in 10 women over 40 and mimics perimenopause symptoms. Learn what the research says about thyroid-supportive nutrients and when to see a doctor.
